author: BREND
provenance_note: LOGIC, STATS, SYSTEMS, PERSONALITY, GOVERNANCE removed v3.0 — content was in model weights (duplicative), gate specs never had a runtime interpreter, and tier-tag policy (T1/T2) was a citation-field presence check not a grounding check. BUILDSCI and IMAGEGEN retained — both carry out-of-distribution material (formulas with empirical coefficients, image-gen failure modes) the model can't reproduce from weights.
